The group also reported large-scale rocket barrages targeting multiple northern Israeli locations, including Kiryat Shmona, Metula, Misgav Am, Kfar Giladi, Nahariya, Avivim, Yir’on, and others. Hezbollah further claimed it intercepted an Israeli Hermes 450 drone over the Zahrani coast using a surface-to-air missile and carried out strikes on the Shraga base north of Acre using rockets and attack drones. The escalation comes amid ongoing Israel–Lebanon talks in Washington. @wfwitness

He indicated the talks are more likely to return to Pakistan rather than Europe. Trump also expressed displeasure with reports that the US had asked Iran to suspend uranium enrichment for 20 years, saying: “I’ve been saying they can’t have nuclear weapons, so I don’t like the 20 years.” @wfwitness

The meeting is being mediated by US, with the involvement of Secretary of State Marco Rubio and US ambassador to Lebanon. The talks come as Zionist regime continues its bombardment and occupation of southern Lebanon.

Faytuks News "During the first 24 hours, no ships made it past the U.S. blockade and 6 merchant vessels complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around to re-enter an Iranian port on the Gulf of Oman." More than 10,000 U.S. Sailors, Marines, and Airmen along with over a dozen warships and dozens of aircraft are executing the mission to blockade ships entering and departing Iranian ports. During the first 24 hours, no ships made it past the U.S. blockade and 6 merchant vessels complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around to re-enter an Iranian port on the Gulf of Oman. The blockade is being enforced impartially against vessels of all nations entering or departing Iranian ports and coastal areas, including all Iranian ports on the Arabian Gulf and Gulf of Oman. U.S. forces are supporting freedom of navigation for vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz to and from non-Iranian ports. - U.S. Central Command tweet
Trump: Iran would blow up Italy in two minutes if it had the chance. Source: Corriere
Trump criticized Meloni after she condemned his remarks about Pope Leo XIV, saying: “She is the one who is unacceptable… she doesn’t care if Iran has a nuclear weapon.” Source: Corriere
Trump said he was “shocked” by Giorgia Meloni, claiming she refused to support the U.S. in its war with Iran. “I thought she had courage, but I was wrong.” Source: Corriere

⚡ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 L’Orient-Le Jour: French shipping giant CMA CGM has reportedly acquired Lebanon’s Fattal Group, marking one of the largest recent foreign investments in the country. Fattal Group, founded in 1897, remains a Lebanese-rooted company in operations and identity, though ownership would shift to the French firm under the deal. The acquisition reflects CMA CGM’s continued expansion in Lebanon, where it has already invested in port operations and logistics infrastructure. @wfwitness
Sec Rubio : This meeting is not about a ceasefire. It is not an event it is a process.

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇹 🇻🇦 🇭🇺 Corriere della Sera: U.S. President Trump said he is “shocked” by Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni, claiming she does not want to help the U.S. get rid of Iran’s nuclear weapon. “She says Italy does not want to be involved. She thinks America should do the work for her,” Trump said. He added that they have not spoken for a long time. On Pope Leo XIV, Trump said: “He doesn’t understand and shouldn’t speak about war, because he has no idea what is going on. He doesn’t understand that Iran constitutes a nuclear threat.” Trump praised Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán, saying: “He didn’t let people come and ruin his country like Italy did.” @wfwitness

IDF Givati Brigade soldier in Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon, standing near a Hezbollah memorial wall. The town is long considered a symbolic and operational hub for Hezbollah. It was a scene of intense urban fighting between the IDF and Hezbollah in 2006 War.

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ : The U.S. military has seized Iran‑linked ships as part of its blockade of Iranian ports, with vessels to be taken to a holding area in the Arabian Sea or Indian Ocean. During the first 24 hours of the blockade, which began Monday morning, no ship breached the blockade, according to U.S. Central Command. Six merchant vessels obeyed U.S. orders to reverse course and re‑enter an Iranian port on the Gulf of Oman. More than 10,000 US sailors, marines and airmen, along with more than a dozen warships and aircraft, are involved in the mission. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇳🇴 U.S. President Trump criticised the United Kingdom for refusing to open North Sea oil production, calling it “tragic”. He said Norway sells its North Sea oil to the UK at double the price, making a fortune, while Aberdeen should be booming. Trump urged the UK to “drill, baby, drill” and added “no more windmills”. @wfwitness
